_source: MOE Singapore Primary School Assessment Standards
_note: Mark weights reflect typical school assessments. PSLE is set by SEAB separately.

sections.label: Section A — Multiple Choice
sections.instructions: Choose the correct answer (A, B, C or D) for each question.

sections.label: Section B — Short Answer
sections.instructions: Write your answer in the space provided. Show your working clearly.

sections.label: Section C — Word Problems
sections.instructions: Show all working clearly. Each question is worth 4 marks.

sections.label: Section A — Grammar MCQ
sections.instructions: Choose the most appropriate answer (A, B, C or D) to complete each sentence.

sections.label: Section B — Grammar Cloze
sections.instructions: Choose the best word to fill in each blank. Each passage has 7 blanks.

sections.label: Section C — Editing
sections.instructions: Each passage has one error. Identify and correct the underlined error.

P6:english._note: Paper 2 only (Grammar + Cloze + Editing). Paper 1 (Composition) excluded.

sections.label: Section A — Grammar MCQ
sections.instructions: Choose the most appropriate answer (A, B, C or D) to complete each sentence.

sections.label: Section B — Grammar Cloze
sections.instructions: Choose the best word to fill in each blank. Each passage has 10 blanks.

sections.label: Section C — Editing
sections.instructions: Each passage has one error. Identify the line and write the correct word.
